description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI/CD that runs on push to any branch, on pull requests to main and develop, and on a daily schedule. The workflow should have a build job that runs on a matrix of OS environments (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest) and Python versions (3.10, and additional specific versions on ubuntu-latest). For each job, check out the code, set up the corresponding Python version, install dependencies with make install, run tests with make test or nosetests depending on the OS, and upload coverage to Codecov for ubuntu-latest with Python 3.10.
